title: kit03-hephaestus-cu-locked
prompt:
Render ONE finished full-frame cinematic storyboard image, 16:9 — no grid, no panels, no borders, no text, clean intentional painterly surface (NO grain, NO noise).

The attached reference image is the LOCKED character model sheet for HEPHAESTUS — match his face, hair, beard, age and costume EXACTLY: a MIDDLE-AGED smith (late 40s to early 50s — NOT an old man, NOT white-haired), MUSTARD-BLONDE swept-back hair, a SHORT greyish-white squared beard with NO MUSTACHE (the upper lip is bare), broad heavy build, coarse off-white tunic draped over the LEFT shoulder.

THE SHOT — CLOSE-UP on Hephaestus: his weary, lined face in three-quarter view, looking screen-right toward his work; tender and proud, with the first flicker of unease. Soft and thrown out of focus behind him: a few burnished-gold automata and a warm orange spark-glow. The setting is the cool blue-violet forge-hall in volumetric haze. Painterly cinematic concept-art, warm-gold-on-cool palette.
